remediation_steps.next_best_action: Investigate monitor flickering connected via docking station. Cable swap did not resolve — likely a monitor hardware fault or docking station issue.

remediation_steps.next_best_action: Investigate Outlook attachment size limit configuration after the recent update. Verify the actual attachment size limit policy and whether the recent update changed the default settings.

Identify which policy is enforcing MFA for these applications

Verify SSO access is restored for affected users across all applications
remediation_steps.next_best_action: Dispatch a technician to Floor 5 to diagnose the HP LaserJet Pro M404n false paper jam error. Time-sensitive: 200 pages of compliance reports needed by 3 PM for a board meeting.

Check for paper dust, torn paper fragments, or sensor obstructions causing the false jam error

If the printer cannot be repaired quickly, redirect the print job to an alternate printer on the same floor

remediation_steps.next_best_action: Investigate SharePoint upload failure for a 45MB Excel file. Check SharePoint upload size limits, network throttling, and whether the file exceeds the tenant's file size policy.

Check if the 45MB file exceeds the configured maximum for the document library

Check for any SharePoint throttling or network proxy issues on the user's connection
remediation_steps.next_best_action: Contact the reporter to gather basic details about the laptop issue: what is happening, what device model, what error messages are shown, and how it affects their work.

Determine the laptop model, the nature of the issue, and any error messages

Verify DHCP lease and DNS resolution on the corporate network

Analyze the phishing email headers and malicious URL
Block the sender domain (outlook-verify.com) in the email gateway
Search email logs for other recipients of the same campaign
